biz.title: Lovable reportedly in talks to double its valuation to $13.2B
biz.summary: The $300 million round is expected to be led by Menlo Ventures, Sifted reported.

biz.title: With EU backing, QuantumDiamonds aims to speed up chip manufacturing
biz.summary: Like its U.S. counterpart, the European Chips Act aims to foster the semiconductor industry — in part thanks to state subsidies. One of the beneficiaries is QuantumDiamonds, a German startup that applies a novel approach to inspecting chips.

biz.title: Autonomous drone delivery startup Manna plots major US expansion
biz.summary: Manna is launching a U.S. operations and manufacturing facility in Tulsa, Oklahoma, that will eventually employ 1,000 people.

biz.title: SpaceXAI releases Grok 4.5, which Elon describes as an ‘Opus-class model’
biz.summary: Elon Musk's tech company released the newest version of Grok on Wednesday, promising a cheaper, more efficient alternative to other powerful AI models.

biz.title: This startup thinks robotics is about to have its ChatGPT moment
biz.summary: General Intuition is betting millions of hours of video game data can train the foundation models for physical AI, making it easier to build smarter robots with minimal real-world data.

biz.title: Google Photos adds a new AI ‘Video Remix’ tool
biz.summary: The feature can do things like apply cinematic relighting to brighten up a dark clip, swap out a plain background for something fun, or add artistic styles to videos.

biz.title: Why this CEO thinks video games make better training data than the internet
biz.summary: When it comes to achieving artificial general intelligence (AGI), large language models just don’t have what it takes. Models like ChatGPT and Claude are great at text, but they’re less skilled at understanding how things actually move through space and time&

biz.title: Meta wants its AI glasses to seem less creepy. Its AI strategy says otherwise.
biz.summary: Meta is adding a new safeguard to stop people from secretly recording others with its AI glasses. But the update comes as the company continues to expand how much personal data its AI products collect and use.

biz.title: OpenAI releases new voice models for more natural live conversations
biz.summary: OpenAI says its new voice mode can speak and listen at the same time, a key ability for live translation.

biz.title: Crypto VC firm Paradigm raises $1.2B to invest in ‘technical frontier’ startups
biz.summary: For Paradigm, the technical frontier will stretch beyond its cryptocurrency investment roots. This fund is expected to expand its investment focus to include robotics and AI.
